name: SafeSite AI — Safety Action Effectiveness Agent

meta.description: Weekly SafeSite AI effectiveness review. After import, replace all placeholder values: {{BACKEND_BASE_URL}} (e.g. http://localhost:8000 or your ngrok URL), {{N8N_SAFETY_ACTION_AGENT_API_KEY}} (the N8N_SAFETY_ACTION_AGENT_API_KEY value from your .env). Set EFFECTIVENESS_REVIEW_WINDOW_DAYS=0 in .env for immediate demo evaluation. The agent evaluates whether completed corrective actions reduced violations and stores one result per task (idempotent — safe to re-run).
